toolcall.title: View failed logs for latest run
Extract key linker errors from logs

content.oldText:
- name: Build jsc_disasm tool
        run: |
          ls -la v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a
          g++ -std=c++20 -I v8/include \
            ${{ github.workspace }}/tool/jsc_disasm.cc \
            -o jsc_disasm \
            v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a -pthread -licui18n -licuuc -licudata
          echo "=== Tool built ==="
          ls -la jsc_disasm
content.newText:
- name: Build jsc_disasm tool
        run: |
          ls -la v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a
          g++ -std=c++20 -I v8/include \
            ${{ github.workspace }}/tool/jsc_disasm.cc \
            -o jsc_disasm \
            -Wl,--start-group v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a -Wl,--end-group \
            -Wl,-z,ignore \
            -pthread
          echo "=== Tool built ==="
          ls -la jsc_disasm

toolcall.title: Check order of errors in build log

toolcall.title: Commit and push the workflow fix
Check cache hit status in workflow
Check if CREL errors still present

content.oldText:
- name: Build jsc_disasm tool
        run: |
          ls -la v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a
          g++ -std=c++20 -I v8/include \
            ${{ github.workspace }}/tool/jsc_disasm.cc \
            -o jsc_disasm \
            v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a -pthread -Wl,-z,ignore
          echo "=== Tool built ==="
          ls -la jsc_disasm
content.newText:
- name: Build jsc_disasm tool
        run: |
          ls -la v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a
          CLANG=$(find v8/third_party/llvm-build/Release+Asserts/bin -name 'clang++' 2>/dev/null | head -1)
          if [ -z "$CLANG" ]; then CLANG="v8/third_party/llvm-build/Release+Asserts/bin/clang++"; fi
          echo "Using clang++: $CLANG"
          $CLANG -std=c++20 -I v8/include \
            ${{ github.workspace }}/tool/jsc_disasm.cc \
            -o jsc_disasm \
            v8/out/release/obj/libv8_monolith.a -pthread -Wl,-z,ignore
          echo "=== Tool built ==="
          ls -la jsc_disasm
